info.title: Paket version
info.description: A dependency manager for .NET with support for NuGet packages and git repositories. Aardvark Platform fork with .NET 10.0 support.

commands.name: add
commands.description: add a new dependency

options.name: --project
options.description: add the dependency to a single project only

options.name: --group
options.description: add the dependency to a group (default: Main group)

options.name: --create-new-binding-files
options.description: create binding redirect files if needed

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --interactive
options.description: ask for every project whether to add the dependency

options.name: --clean-redirects
options.description:
remove binding redirects that were not created by
Paket

options.name: --keep-major
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the major version

options.name: --keep-minor
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the minor version

options.name: --keep-patch
options.description:
only allow updates that preserve the patch version
--touch-affected-refs touch project files referencing affected dependencies
to help incremental build tools detecting the change

options.name: --type
options.description: the type of dependency: nuget|clitool (default: nuget)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: auto-restore
commands.description:
manage automatic package restore during the build
process inside Visual Studio

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: config
commands.description:
store global configuration values like NuGet
credentials

options.name: --verify
options.description: specify in case you want to verify the credentials

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: convert-from-nuget
commands.description: convert projects from NuGet to Paket

options.name: --force
options.description:
force the conversion even if paket.dependencies or
paket.references files are present

options.name: --no-auto-restore
options.description: do not enable automatic package restore

options.name: --migrate-credentials
options.description:
specify mode for NuGet source credential migration:
encrypt|plaintext|selective (default: encrypt)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: find-package-versions
commands.description:
search for dependency versions
fix-nuspecs <options> patch a list of .nuspec files to correct transitive
dependencies

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: find-packages
commands.description: search for NuGet packages

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: find-refs
commands.description:
find all project files that have a dependency
installed

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: generate-load-scripts
commands.description:
generate F# and C# include scripts that reference
installed packages in a interactive environment like
F# Interactive or ScriptCS

options.name: --group
options.description:
groups to generate scripts for (default: all groups);
may be repeated

options.name: --framework
options.description:
framework identifier to generate scripts for, such as
net45 or netstandard1.6; may be repeated

options.name: --type
options.description: language to generate scripts for; may be repeated

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: generate-nuspec
commands.description:
generate a default nuspec for a project including its
direct dependencies

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: git
commands.description:
commands to manipulate git repository references
clear-cache <options> clear the global and optionally local NuGet and cache
directories

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: add
commands.description: add git repository

options.name: --version
options.description: dependency version, can be branch, commit-hash or tag

options.name: --group
options.description: add the dependency to a group (default: Main group)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

options.name: --verbose

commands.description: info

options.name: --paket-dependencies-dir
options.description:
absolute path of paket.dependencies directory, if
exists

options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: init
commands.description:
create an empty paket.dependencies file in the
current working directory

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: install
commands.description:
compute dependency graph, download dependencies and
update projects

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --create-new-binding-files
options.description: create binding redirect files if needed

options.name: --clean-redirects
options.description:
remove binding redirects that were not created by
Paket

options.name: --keep-major
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the major version

options.name: --keep-minor
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the minor version

options.name: --keep-patch
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the patch version

options.name: --only-referenced
options.description:
only install dependencies listed in paket.references
files, instead of all packages in paket.dependencies
--touch-affected-refs touch project files referencing affected dependencies
to help incremental build tools detecting the change

options.name: --generate-load-scripts
options.description:
generate F# and C# include scripts that reference
installed packages in a interactive environment like
F# Interactive or ScriptCS

options.name: --load-script-framework
options.description:
framework identifier to generate scripts for, such as
net45 or netstandard1.6; may be repeated

options.name: --load-script-type
options.description:
language to generate scripts for; may be repeated;
may be repeated

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: outdated
commands.description: find dependencies that have newer versions available

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --ignore-constraints
options.description:
ignore version constraints in the paket.dependencies
file

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: pack
commands.description: create NuGet packages from paket.template files

options.name: --build-config
options.description:
build configuration that should be packaged (default:
Release)

options.name: --build-platform
options.description:
build platform that should be packaged (default:
check all known platform targets)

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
exclude paket.template file by package ID; may be
repeated

options.name: --specific-version
options.description: version number to use for package ID; may be repeated

options.name: --lock-dependencies
options.description:
use version constraints from paket.lock instead of
paket.dependencies

options.name: --minimum-from-lock-file
--pin-project-references
options.description:
pin dependencies generated from project references to
exact versions (=) instead of using minimum versions
(>=); with --lock-dependencies project references
will be pinned even if this option is not specified

options.name: --interproject-references
options.description: set constraints for referenced project versions

options.name: --symbols
options.description:
create symbol and source packages in addition to
library and content packages

options.name: --include-referenced-projects
options.description: include symbols and source from referenced projects

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: push
commands.description: push a NuGet package

options.name: --api-key
options.description:
API key for the URL (default: value of the NUGET_KEY
environment variable)

options.name: --ignoreConflicts
options.description:
Ignore any HTTP409 (Conflict) errors and treat as
success

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: remove
commands.description: remove a dependency

options.name: --project
options.description: remove the dependency from a single project only

options.name: --group
options.description:
remove the dependency from a group (default: Main
group)

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --interactive
options.description: ask for every project whether to remove the dependency

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: restore
commands.description: download the computed dependency graph

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --only-referenced
options.description:
only restore packages that are referenced by
paket.references files
--touch-affected-refs touch project files referencing affected dependencies
to help incremental build tools detecting the change

options.name: --ignore-checks
options.description:
do not check if paket.dependencies and paket.lock are
in sync

options.name: --group
options.description: restore dependencies of a single group

options.name: --project
options.description: restore dependencies of a single project

options.name: --references-file
options.description:
restore packages from a paket.references file; may be
repeated

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: restore only for the specified target framework

options.name: --output-path
options.description:
Output path directory of MSBuild. When used in
combination with the new dotnet cli based sdk, paket
will write supporting files (nuget.config,
paket.resolved) there

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: show-installed-packages
commands.description:
show installed top-level packages
show-groups <options> show groups

options.name: --project
options.description: specify project to show dependencies for

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: simplify
commands.description:
simplify declared dependencies by removing transitive
dependencies

options.name: --interactive
options.description: confirm deletion of every transitive dependency

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: update
commands.description: update dependencies to their latest version

options.name: --group
options.description:
specify dependency group to update (default: all
groups)

options.name: --create-new-binding-files
options.description: create binding redirect files if needed

options.name: --force
options.description: force download and reinstallation of all dependencies

options.name: --clean-redirects
options.description:
remove binding redirects that were not created by
Paket

options.name: --keep-major
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the major version

options.name: --keep-minor
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the minor version

options.name: --keep-patch
options.description: only allow updates that preserve the patch version

options.name: --filter
options.description:
treat the NuGet package ID as a regex to filter
packages
--touch-affected-refs touch project files referencing affected dependencies
to help incremental build tools detecting the change

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console

commands.name: why
commands.description:
determine why a dependency is required
restriction <options> resolve a framework restriction and show details

options.name: --details
options.description:
display detailed information with all paths, versions
and framework restrictions

options.name: --verbose
options.description: print detailed information to the console
